step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/fdd965ad-8937-424f-a0a2-783f5dc0b609.zip (0.44 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 148
Executing external process
step.arguments: -c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform nodejs --platform-version 20 -p virtualenv_name= --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8de9814af91df3d -p compress_node_modules=tar-gz | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS "

step.title: Marking deployment as failed and cleaning up the temp deployment
Error occurred
step.text: One or more errors occurred. (Deployment failed)
